mapper.select: select u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.role_code, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar_url, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at from course c join course_member cm on cm.course_id = c.id join sys_user u on u.id = cm.user_id where c.id = #{courseId} and c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and c.status = 1 and cm.member_role = 'STUDENT' and cm.status = 1 and u.status = 1 order by cm.joined_at desc

select u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.role_code, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar_url, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at from course_member cm join sys_user u on u.id = cm.user_id where cm.course_id = #{courseId} and cm.member_role = 'STUDENT' and cm.status = 1 and u.status = 1

select count(1) from course_member cm join course c on c.id = cm.course_id where cm.course_id = #{courseId} and cm.user_id = #{studentId} and cm.member_role = 'STUDENT' and cm.status = 1 and c.status = 1
